articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck.
articles.summary: 提出直接在线策略蒸馏（Direct On-Policy Distillation）方法，避免在每次训练新强模型时重复生成大量轨迹，降低RLVR后训练成本。核心思路是将教师模型的知识通过在线蒸馏高效传递给学生模型，显著减少训练开销。

articles.summary: 提出ABot-N1，统一视觉语言导航基础模型，用于空间决策和多样具身任务。通过融合深度推理与泛化策略，解决现有单一策略难以覆盖广泛场景的问题，在多个导航基准上取得领先性能。

articles.title: ABot-AgentOS: A General Robotic Agent OS with Lifelong Multi-modal Memory

We present ABot-AgentOS, a general robotic Agent Operating System t
articles.summary: 提出ABot-AgentOS，通用机器人Agent操作系统，集成终身多模态记忆、推理、工具使用、验证和跨本体执行。为长周期具身任务提供统一的运行时层，显著提升任务完成率和泛化能力。

articles.title: Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench: Testing the Limits of Agents on Long-Horizon Terminal Tasks with Dense Reward-Based Grading

This setup overlooks intermediate progress and partial solutions, yie
articles.summary: 提出Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench基准，评估长周期终端任务中Agent的中间进展和部分解。采用密集奖励评分，弥补现有基准只关注最终结果的不足，全面衡量长时任务的执行能力。

articles.title: Video-Oasis: Rethinking Evaluation of Video Understanding

While many benchmarks have emerged to assess high-level reasoning, shared criteria for evaluating video unde
articles.summary: Video-Oasis重新审视视频理解评估，区分模型是从视觉感知、语言推理还是知识先验中获益。提出共享评估标准，解决Video-LLM基准中混杂因素的问题，推动公平对比。

articles.title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
articles.excerpt: Driven by next-token prediction, NLP shifted from task-specific models into powerful generalist foundation models. articles.title: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
articles.excerpt: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. articles.summary: 针对语言模型仅从文本预训练，提出可扩展的视觉预训练方法，从图表、公式、页面布局中捕获知识。通过视觉表示增强语言智能，在数学推理、文档理解等任务上提升性能。

articles.title: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks
articles.excerpt: The rapid development of large language models and multimodal large language models has accelerated the emergence of proactive agents capable of operating everyday tools and assisting users in real-world environments. However, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate such agents effectively, as they
articles.summary: 提出UniClawBench通用基准，评估基于LLM/MLLM的主动Agent在现实世界中操作工具、协助用户的能力。覆盖多样化任务和环境，弥补现有基准在主动性和交互性上的不足。

articles.title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
articles.excerpt: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-ba
articles.summary: 提出LongE2V，利用预训练视频扩散先验解决稀疏事件流的高质量视频重建、预测和帧插值。克服回归方法纹理模糊和生成模型长期不稳定问题，实现长时间稳定高清输出。

articles.title: Trust Region Policy Distillation
articles.excerpt: Big goals are hard to achieve all at once; breaking them into small steps is wiser. We present Trust Region Policy Distillation (TOP-D), which transforms the notoriously unstable, high-variance On-Policy Distillation (OPD) into a stable training paradigm by dynamically constructing a proximal teache
articles.summary: 提出Trust Region Policy Distillation（TOP-D），通过动态构建近端教师模型，将高方差在线策略蒸馏转化为稳定训练范式。类似将大目标分解为小步骤，提升蒸馏效率和模型性能。

articles.title: AdvancedMathBench: A Benchmark Suite for Advanced Mathematical Proof Generation and Verification
articles.excerpt: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable performance on high-school and olympiad-style mathematics, yet their capabilities on advanced mathematics remain poorly understood. Existing benchmarks, however, fall short in both scope and evaluation granularity: they provide limited disciplina
articles.summary: AdvancedMathBench基准套件，覆盖高等数学证明生成与验证的多学科。弥补现有基准在范围和粒度上的不足，系统评估LLM对大学级数学的推理能力，揭示模型在复杂证明中的局限。

articles.title: KronQ: LLM Quantization via Kronecker-Factored Hessian
articles.excerpt: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is a widely adopted technique for compressing large language models (LLMs) without retraining. Existing second-order PTQ methods, including GPTQ, construct quantization objectives exclusively from input activation statistics, effectively assuming that all output chan
articles.summary: 提出KronQ，基于Kronecker-Factored Hessian的LLM量化方法，在PTQ中利用输出通道信息。相比只关注输入激活的二阶方法（如GPTQ），更准确地捕捉参数重要性，降低量化损失，提升压缩后模型质量。

articles.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
articles.excerpt: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. To address the lack of large-scale, high-quality training data tailored to in-context panoramic tasks, we propose Canvas36
articles.summary: 提出Canvas360两阶段框架，通过几何感知预训练（Canvas360-DB）结合下游微调实现上下文全景生成。解决全景任务中大规模高质量训练数据缺失问题，提升生成质量和几何一致性。

articles.title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
articles.excerpt: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterati
articles.summary: 针对移动设备图像到视频生成中的电影级运动（如子弹时间、滑动变焦），提出CineMobile。采用轻量级Diffusion Transformer设计，减少参数量和推理步数，实现设备端高效生成。

articles.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities
articles.excerpt: Metacognition is a foundational component of intelligence critical to effective learning, problem solving, decision-making, communication, and more. In recent years, it has become increasingly recognized as a cornerstone of capable, transparent AI systems. Yet while LLMs have made significant progre
articles.summary: 综述LLM中的元认知：基础、进展与机遇。探讨元认知作为智能核心组件在自主学习、推理、决策中的作用，梳理现有方法将元认知能力融入LLM的路径与未来方向。

articles.title: Read It Back: Pretrained MLLMs Are Zero-Shot Reward Models for Text-to-Image Generation
articles.excerpt: In this paper, we propose SpectraReward, a training-free reward function that turns pretrained MLLMs into off-the-shelf reward models for image-generation reinforcement learning. Instead of asking the MLLM to judge a generated image or answer decomposed verification questions, SpectraReward measures
articles.summary: 提出SpectraReward，免训练奖励函数，将预训练MLLM直接用作文本到图像生成的奖励模型。通过测量生成图像与文本的一致性（而非直接判断），实现零样本强化学习微调，提高图像质量。

articles.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning
articles.excerpt: Fine-tuning LLMs to inject new knowledge faces a critical challenge: LLMs can quickly memorize new facts, yet fail to use them for downstream reasoning tasks. articles.summary: 揭示LLM微调中记忆新知识但无法泛化到推理任务的「Knowing-Using Gap」。形式化为准确率差距与时间延迟，分析其机制原因，并提出缓解策略，提升知识落地应用能力。

articles.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
articles.excerpt: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. As trajectories grow, task requirements, environment facts, prior attempts, diagnoses, and open subgoals can be buried in the context window or pushed bey
articles.summary: 提出Proactive Memory Agent，为长周期任务构建主动记忆模块。在轨迹增长时自动检索任务需求、环境事实、失败诊断等分散信息，避免被上下文窗口淹没，显著提升长时任务完成率。

articles.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs
articles.excerpt: Long-context processing has become increasingly important for large language models (LLMs), but simply extending the context window does not guarantee effective utilization of long inputs. articles.summary: 提出自引导测试时训练方法，解决长上下文LLM中窗口增长导致准确率下降的问题。通过让模型在测试时自适应识别和利用关键长程信息，提升对长输入的有效利用率。

articles.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance: A Modular LLM Post-Training Paradigm via Proxy-Guided Update Signals

articles.summary: 提出代理探索与可重用引导范式，将LLM后训练中的策略探索与分布对齐解耦。通过代理探索生成指导信号并复用，避免直接在策略上进行昂贵探索，降低后训练成本并提升领域适配效果。

articles.title: Multi-Agent LLMs Fail to Explore Each Other
